updates.title: Pressure-current caves
updates.summary: Added pressure-current caves in the Deep Sea biome with drifting enemies and collapsing coral tunnels.

updates.title: Aerial momentum rework
updates.summary: Reworked aerial movement so chained dashes carry more momentum through combat rooms.

updates.title: Spirit Seal Gate variants
updates.summary: New Spirit Seal Gate variants now include survival waves, precision platform routes, and no-hit arena trials.

updates.title: Blueprint modifiers
updates.summary: Added blueprint modifiers that trade survivability for higher crown payout and faster movement speed.

updates.title: Enemy stagger readability
updates.summary: Updated enemy stagger reactions to improve combat readability during crowded encounters.

updates.title: Ember Cavern expansion
updates.summary: Expanded Ember Cavern with lava lift machinery, heat vents, and hidden traversal shortcuts.

updates.title: Phase-evolving boss hazards
updates.summary: Boss arenas now feature biome-specific hazards that evolve between phases.

updates.title: Controller responsiveness
updates.summary: Improved controller responsiveness and reduced input buffering during hammer slam recovery.

updates.title: Environmental storytelling props
updates.summary: Added new environmental storytelling props across Town Hall and Assembly sectors.

updates.title: Early-game crown economy
updates.summary: Rebalanced early-game crown economy to make upgrade paths less restrictive.

updates.title: Low-gravity Space chains
updates.summary: Space biome now includes low-gravity traversal chains and projectile-heavy ambush encounters.

updates.title: Cinematic lighting pass
updates.summary: Improved cinematic lighting pass for ruins, underground halls, and ocean pressure zones.

updates.title: Hidden challenge rooms
updates.summary: Added hidden challenge rooms containing prototype relic upgrades and bonus currency caches.

updates.title: Aggressive enemy patrols
updates.summary: Enemy patrols now react more aggressively when players break Spirit Seal structures nearby.

updates.title: Smoother room transitions
updates.summary: Updated room transitions to reduce loading hitching between combat-heavy arenas.

updates.title: Ambient soundtrack layering
updates.summary: Added new ambient soundtrack layering for underwater and industrial regions.

updates.title: Expanded lore fragments
updates.summary: Expanded lore fragments describing the origin of the Crownless kingdoms and sealed gates.

updates.title: Heavier melee impact
updates.summary: Refined hitstop and screen shake values to make melee impacts feel heavier without slowing traversal.

updates.title: High-risk relics
updates.summary: Added optional high-risk relics that permanently alter enemy behavior for a run.

updates.title: Dynamic miniboss routes
updates.summary: New miniboss encounters now appear dynamically in select traversal routes.
